articles.description: Duterte is facing charges of crimes against humanity for his alleged involvement in dozens of killings as part of his so-called war on drugs when in office.

articles.title: ICC judges find former Philippine President Duterte fit to stand trial
articles.description: Judges cite report by medical experts saying the 80-year-old is able 'effectively to exercise his procedural rights'.
articles.content:
Judges on the International Criminal Court (ICC) have ruled that former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte is fit to stand trial for alleged crimes against humanity.

articles.title: Philippines’ Duterte to face ICC hearing next month as judges toss out health defence
articles.description:
Former Philippines president Rodrigo Duterte will face a hearing at the International Criminal Court (ICC) next month, judges ruled on Monday, rejecting arguments the 80-year-old was unfit to take part.
